title: Pinned recipe and product planned nutrition summaries
summary: Recipe Meal의 pin된 recipe snapshot과 ProductPlannerEntry의 pin된 product version만 최대 7일 range/day/column 계획 영양으로 합산하고, PLANNER_WEEK compact 열량과 MEAL_SCREEN 핵심 5종 상세에서 partial/unavailable/quality를 보존한다.
goal: 사용자가 기존 Recipe Meal과 완제품 계획을 과거 pin 기준으로 재현 가능한 끼니·날짜·주간 계획 영양으로 확인하되 결측을 0이나 실제 섭취로 오해하지 않게 한다.

owners.claude: replaced only for the user-approved nutrition/products/planner program; the global stage-owner policy is unchanged
owners.codex: fresh role-separated Codex tasks own Stage 1 docs, independent Stage 1.5 review and repair-final, Stage 2 backend TDD, independent Stage 3 review, Stage 4 frontend, authority precheck, Stage 5 and final authority, and Stage 6; no author or implementer self-approves

dependencies: recipe-nutrition-calculation backend and frontend are merged in origin/master ancestry and provide immutable recipe snapshots plus nullable Meal pins
prepared-food-planner-entry docs backend frontend and closeout are merged through 64d2b5145d1e96772eb7dfee4d4057cafcab8f64 and provide immutable product version pins
nutrition products planner contract is locked in official requirements v1.7.20 screen v1.5.26 flow v1.3.23 database v1.3.21 and API v1.2.25
independent fresh Codex Stage 1.5 approval is required before Stage 2 starts

actual_verification_refs: Stage 2 RED: missing aggregate module, undefined read model, missing route module, and missing isolated PostgreSQL runner each failed before implementation
Targeted aggregate/API/read-model/runner lifecycle plus existing planner/meals/product/snapshot regressions passed 8 files and 55 tests

tests/planner-nutrition-postgres.integration.test.ts via scripts/run-planner-nutrition-postgres-integration.mjs passed 2/2 on isolated non-5432 PostgreSQL 17.10 with real bootstrap, owner A/B, pinned recipe/product aggregates, old-pin stability, source-version separation, bounded reads, zero measured writes, and process/socket/temp cleanup
pnpm verify:backend passed lint with 0 errors and 4 unrelated existing warnings, typecheck, 1560 product tests with 24 intended skips, production build, and security Playwright 12/12

Fresh independent Stage 3 reviewer approved exact backend head 624c57ed7ba2b154cabbb949d09732eed406b273 with STAGE3_APPROVED and Blocker/Important/Suggestion 0/0/0 after role-separated closeout, runner cleanup, and shutdown tri-state repairs
GitHub PR #1021 started checks at exact head 624c57ed7ba2b154cabbb949d09732eed406b273 completed with 0 failed and 0 pending checks
No migration, RPC, dependency, generic preparation/size/edible field, or unapproved endpoint/query/response/status/error surface was added; production/staging/provider writes remain 0
Stage 4 targeted planner nutrition API/UI and existing screen regressions passed 4 files and 99 tests; QA fixture browser passed desktop, 390px, and 320px projects 12/12

Stage 4 retained paired PLANNER_WEEK and MEAL_SCREEN before/after evidence at 320, 390, and desktop 1280 plus complete, partial, unavailable, mixed, loading, error, empty, and stale-response states under ui/designs/evidence/planner-nutrition-summary
pnpm verify:frontend:pr passed; full accessibility 18 passed/15 skipped, full visual 23 passed/22 skipped, and security 12/12 passed after intentional Darwin planner and meal baseline refresh

The second full pnpm verify:frontend run reached regression 867 passed/112 skipped but returned non-zero for two pre-existing slice-17a-mypage mobile-chrome flakes; the exact two tests then passed 2/2 in isolation, so Linux current-head PR CI remains required rather than projecting green

The 127.0.0.1-only full local Supabase/PostgREST/auth smoke was attempted once after project-local stop/reset, but Docker left supabase_db_homecook in Created and docker start itself did not respond; isolated PostgreSQL 17.10 2/2 and fixture browser evidence are not substitutes, and final cross-slice QA will retry once after Docker daemon recovery

Stage 4 implementation is pending-review only; fresh authority precheck, Stage 5, final authority, Stage 6, current-head checks, physical-device/screen-reader review, and final closeout remain pending

out_of_scope: Actual consumption eaten skipped nutrition goals goal attainment and medical disease coaching
Current recipe snapshot or product version repin backfill or immutable snapshot mutation
Existing GET planner GET meals POST meals or product entry mutation shape changes
New endpoint query response field HTTP status error code workflow status table column index trigger or RPC
Entry-level new missing-reason or partial-unavailable-count API fields
Cooking loss generic preparation size edible fields density relation chaining OCR barcode dining out and meal kit
Production staging external provider writes and secret or raw provider output
notes: Canonical Stage 4 frontend pending-review projection: .workflow-v2/work-items/planner-nutrition-summary.json#closeout. The independently approved Stage 3 backend head remains 624c57ed7ba2b154cabbb949d09732eed406b273. Stage 4 connects the exact read-only GET to compact PLANNER_WEEK range/day kcal and MEAL_SCREEN current-column core-five details while preserving missing-not-zero, quality, warning safety, existing content, CTA, and return context. Targeted Vitest passed 99/99, QA fixture browser passed 12/12 across desktop/390/320, pnpm verify:frontend:pr passed, and full a11y/visual/security suites passed. The second full frontend run had two unrelated slice-17a-mypage mobile-chrome flakes that passed 2/2 in isolation, so current-head Linux CI remains pending. The full local Supabase browser smoke is blocked by the local Docker daemon not starting the current project DB container; Stage 2 isolated PostgreSQL and fixture browser are not substitutes, and final cross-slice QA will retry once. lifecycle remains in_progress, Design Status pending-review, closeout_phase=projecting, auto_merge=false, required_checks pending, and authority precheck/Stage 5/final authority/Stage 6/final closeout remain pending.
